arts.ttl: Mavropanos and Soler return to starting XI for Liverpool visit
arts.sum: West Ham United: Areola, Wan-Bissaka, Todibo, Kilman, Mavropanos, Scarles, Ward-Prowse, Soler, Paquetá, Kudus, Bowen © Alongside Füllkrug will be goalkeeper Łukasz Fabiański, defenders Vladimír Coufal and Emerson, midfielders Álvarez, Souček and Guido Rodríguez, and forwards Luis Guilherme and Evan Ferguson.

arts.ttl: Salah close to SHOCK move before signing new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Salah finally signed his new Liverpool contract, putting to an end speculation that he could leave for the Saudi Pro League, who have been chasing him for over two years now. Mo Salah considered a shock return to Chelsea before signing his new Liverpool contract.

arts.sum: Jonathan David is set to leave Lille in the summer and according to recent reports, may be set for a move to the Premier League.

arts.ttl: “Pushing for start” | Early Team News | Liverpool vs West Ham
arts.sum: Niclas Fullkrug is pushing for a start when we face Liverpool at Anfield later today. Although his fitness is to be understandably assessed closely, having recently come back from a serious hamstring injury, many will hope Potter opts to play the German from the off. Reporting on The West Ham Way Patreon, club insider advised... The post “Pushing for start” | Early Team News | Liverpool vs West Ham appeared first on The West Ham Way.
